title: Connect column multi link column was deleted by mistake - can I bring it back
excerpt:
Hi all, 
We have two boards, Quotes and Contacts and initially we setup a Connect Board column from Quotes to Contacts and ticked the  “Allow linking to multiple items” which should create a connect field in Contacts whi…

posts.author: Jason_FuzzyLogic (Jason Ried)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

We have two boards, Quotes and Contacts and initially we setup a Connect Board column from Quotes to Contacts and ticked the “Allow linking to multiple items” which should create a connect field in Contacts which automatically links.

My issue is that this column in Contacts has been deleted. Is there anyway to get this to create again?

I can’t setup the connection from scratch as we have thousands of items and it would take forever to manually link them.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Jason_FuzzyLogic

Have you tried restoring it from the Recycle bin?

posts.author: Jason_FuzzyLogic (Jason Ried)
posts.cookedHtml:
So many changes have been made by people that we can’t tell which it is.
I see I can add the connect field in the Contacts board manually and anything linked going forward does at least work, but it’s such a pain
